verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a single-pass type I integral membrane protein with a well-documented cycling pathway between the trans-Golgi network and the cell surface via endosomes. Although the dominant steady-state localization is the TGN, the protein reaches the PM through its own transmembrane anchor via vesicular trafficking. This constitutes a documented PM minority pool reached through the protein's own mechanism (single-pass TM topology with active secretory pathway cycling).
